query:
UPDATE taskCompletion SET notionLastEdited = NULL, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE organizationId = 240001 AND notionLastEdited IS NULL AND updatedAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY);
UPDATE validationResults SET notionLastEdited = NULL, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE organizationId = 240001 AND notionLastEdited IS NULL AND updatedAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY);
